name: tereon
description: A pluggable geospatial research foundation for map-based scientific modules.

scripts.check: node --check src/server/server.js && node --check public/foundation/core/event-bus.js && node --check public/foundation/core/module-loader.js && node --check public/foundation/map/coordinate-system.js && node --check public/foundation/map/layer-manager.js && node --check public/foundation/map/render-scheduler.js && node --check public/foundation/performance/geometry-index.js && node --check public/foundation/ui/utilities.js
